name: Binny Bansal
profileSummary: Binny Bansal is an Indian billionaire Internet entrepreneur. As of February 2024, his net worth was estimated at US$1.4 billion. In 2007, he co-founded the e-commerce platform Flipkart. He was the chief operating officer (COO) until January 2016, when he was promoted to chief executive officer (CEO). He was promoted to Group CEO in January 2017 but resigned in November 2018 following allegations of personal misconduct at Flipkart. He is an anchor investor in the venture firm 021 Capital. In 2019, Bansal invested in the endowment fund of the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Delhi.
